Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to analyze the event log. Activities that appear multiple times within same case: Verify Documents appears twice in C001 and C003; Call Customer appears twice in C002; also Verify Documents appears in all cases but with different context. So recurring activities: Verify Documents and Call Customer.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In C001: first Verify Documents is initial check, then after missing docs, re-check. In C003: first physical verification, then re-verify after adjustment. In C002, Call Customer: first is outbound to clarify discrepancy, second is follow-up to confirm adjustments.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For Verify Documents: first occurrence could be Initial Document Verification, second Re-Verify Documents after Corrections or something. For Call Customer: first Outbound Call to Clarify Issue, second Follow-up Call to Confirm Resolution.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: The task says rename them to reflect their context for activities that appear multiple times within the same case. But we can also rename across cases for clarity? To be consistent across cases, we might rename all occurrences to distinguish based on context.

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Thus final decision: Rename only the repeating instances within each case. But note: In C001, there is also a Call Customer but its single, so unchanged. Later: The better approach is to rename all instances of the activity to reflect their context, thereby eliminating the ambiguity.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The prompt says carefully analyze the log and then rename the activities so that their names clearly reflect their contextual differences. So renaming all occurrences to be distinct is appropriate.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Thus plan: For Verify Documents: C001 first Initial Document Verification, C001 second Re-Verify Documents after Customer Submission, C002 Initial Document Verification, C003 first Initial Document Verification, C003 second Re-Verify Documents after Account Adjustment. For Call Customer: specific descriptions per context.
